understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate through a grid-based puzzle, completing each level by stepping onto goal cells that require your piece to have specific shape, color, and rotation attributes. You must plan a route, manage stamina, and avoid losing all lives to advance through all levels and win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game uses a grid with walls, modifier tiles (shape, color, rotation), and goal cells. Your piece has a shape, color, and rotation; stepping on modifier tiles cycles or rotates these attributes. Each move costs stamina; running out costs a life and resets stamina. Losing all lives ends the game. Goal cells activate only when all three attributes match their requirements. The direction you cannot move is given by 'blocked_directions' each turn.
